calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2002 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Wallace M. Tice, Esq. & Susan Carbone Keeney, Esq. 397-2800 for pltfs/x-defts Royal Indemnity Company and Continental Insurance Company, and x-defts Hines Interest Limited Partnership, and 101 California Venture; David W. Evans, Esq. 986-7700 for deft/x-deft/x-complainant Protectors Insurance Company of Vermont; John F. Hughes, Esq. 986-5900 for deft/x-deft/x-complainant Twin City Fire Insurance Company.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Royal's motion for summary adjudication re PICV duty to defend Hines grant. Hines is additional insured under PICV policy endorsement 8. APS has contracted to protect Hines accordingly policy definition of additional insured applies to Hines.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Mr. Tice to prepare order.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: (see lines above; exceeds one page, therefore does not print out on calendar.)
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: PICV motion for summary adjudication re cross-complaint against Twin for declaratory relief grant. PICV has paid limits of primary insurance.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Mr. Evans to prepare order.

MOTION For Correction By The Court Of November 26, 2001 Order Granting Protectors' Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Wallace M. Tice, Esq. & Susan Carbone Keeney, Esq. 397-2800 for pltfs/x-defts Royal Indemnity Company and Continental Insurance Company, and x-defts Hines Interest Limited Partnership, and 101 California Venture; David W. Evans, Esq. 986-7700 for deft/x-deft/x-complainant Protectors Insurance Company of Vermont; John F. Hughes, Esq. 986-5900 for deft/x-deft/x-complainant Twin City Fire Insurance Company.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to correct denied - 1)no adequate basis for continuance to conduct discovery given impending trial date 2)no other issues to adjudicate in cross-complaint.
Argued and the Court grants the motion to correct in part to substitute the language which any defendant could recover against PICV.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2001 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Wallace M. Tice, Esq. 397-2800 for pltfs; David W. Evans, Esq. & Kelly Reynolds Fogarty, Esq. 986-7700 for Protectors Insurance Company of Vermont; John F. Hughes, Esq. & Caron L. Stapleton, Esq. 986-5900 for Twin City Fire Insurance Company.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Motion by Protectors for summary judgment re obligation of excess carriers because of payment of policy limit on Protectors policy denied. Attorney fee payments do not discharge obligation to pay bodily injury damages.
Twin City motion for summary adjudication on 6th cause of action on x-complaint & 3rd cause of action on complaint granted.
Westchesters motion granted.
Plaintiffs motion for summary adjudication denied no duty by Twin City or Westchester.
Argued and the Court took the matters under submission with the exception that plaintiffs motion is denied, premature. Each to prepare proposed orders by 11/13.
